final:
// // This module implements a master-slave D latch where the master captures the input on clock edge and the slave outputs it on the next clock edge.
module master_slave_d_latch (
    input wire D,         // Data input
    input wire clk,      // Clock (enable) input
    output reg Q         // Output
);
    reg master;          // Master latch output

    always @(clk or D) begin
        if (clk) begin
            master <= D; // Capture data on enable high
        end
    end

    always @(negedge clk) begin
        Q <= master;     // Output the master value on enable low
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a master-slave D latch where the master captures the input on clock edge and the slave outputs it on the next clock edge.
